Switch clarity ON OFF Privacy policy close Website Courses Staff --> Sustainability rankings Study Research Explore Connect Website Courses Staff --> Search icon Close menu icon Menu icon bar 1 Menu icon bar 2 Menu icon bar 3 Home Explore Awards and rankings Sustainability rankings Awards and rankings Sustainability rankings Sustainability rankings We are ranked in the top 30 universities in the world for sustainability. QS Sustainability Rankings 2026 World 27th out of 1,994 universities We rank 27th in the world, 15th in Europe and 11th in the UK.  The QS Sustainability Rankings are global university rankings that evaluate institutions on their environmental impact, social responsibility, and governance practices.  In particular, the University of Glasgow excels in Social Impact, achieving an impressive 3rd place worldwide.   THE Impact Rankings 2025 World 12th out of 2,318 institutions We rank top in Scotland, second in the UK and third in Europe. The THE Impact Rankings benchmark performance of universities against the 17 UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). They consider universities’ commitment to addressing the world's most pressing challenges, including environmental sustainability, social inclusion, economic
